title: Live staged build live LLM opt-in proof (per-step)
problem: Staged spine uses mock LLM for build-relationships after live OpenAlex ingest. Pre-ticket-211 GO defines a per-step live Ollama build proof on rank-1 staged source with mock extract and mock link upstream.
acceptance_criteria: Live staged build fallthrough bypasses staged-fetch auto-mock when env gate set.
Opt-in pytest (live_network + live_smoke) proves discover→ingest→mock extract→mock link→live build on temp DB.
Default pytest and staged orchestrator remain mock-only.
non_goals: Live extract + live link + live build in same pytest.
rollback_plan: Revert fallthrough gate, test, and ci deselect entry.
category: Phase 3 / live LLM / staged spine product-risk
